raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The bill AB 1902 requires pharmacy dispensers to provide accessible prescription medication labels for patients who identify as blind or having low-vision upon request.",
    "Accessible prescription medication labels include supplemental documentation with large font, braille, or text-to-speech technology.",
    "The initiative for accessible prescription medication labels has persisted for more than a decade.",
    "AB 1902 was based on recommendations published in 2013 from a United States Access Board Working Group.",
    "AB 1902 represents a significant step toward ensuring that all Californians can receive accommodations within the healthcare space."
  ]
}
```
